title: AIM Away Message
text:
## AIM Away Message

brb {verb ending in -ing}ing 4 a while!!!

**If u need me:** Prob at the {adjective} mall or fighting my {adjective} brother 4 the computer.

**Current mood:** {adjective}

**Listening 2:** {plural noun} on my {adjective} CD player.

**Leave a {plural noun} if u wanna talk about {plural noun}, homework, or who {past-tense verb} who on the bus.

**Back @** {number} unless dial-up is {adjective} again lol.

**Auto-reply:** BRB DO NOT {verb} MY PROFILE!!! ~*{person} ~*
